title: melilotus laxiflorus
intro: Melilotus laxiflorus, also known as white sweet clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. It contains coumarin and other bioactive compounds, which have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin irritations, wounds, and inflammation. The health benefits of Melilotus laxiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
